releaseNotes:
• New liquid glass UI design — dark + frosted glass
• Bottom navigation bar: Assistant | Chat | Settings | About
• Time-based greeting (Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening)
• Large centered mic button on home screen
• Quick action chips: Joke, Aaj ka din, Summarize, Likhne mein help
• New Aria logo with sound wave arcs
• Auto switch to Chat tab to show command results
• Firebase Authentication — login, signup, forgot password
• Splash screen with animated logo
• Particle visual effects on home screen
• Offline command support: calls, alarms, 25+ Indian apps
• Auto-update checker via GitHub releases
